capabilities.name: Page hierarchy/tree
capabilities.verify: wiki_pages is flat (slug PK); no parent/tree fields in wiki-module

capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.verify: search_wiki skill (ILIKE over title + content_md); search box in admin WikiPage.tsx

capabilities.name: Internal linking
capabilities.verify: [[WikiWord]]/CamelCase auto-linking documented in manage_wiki_page content_md param; WikiMarkdown.tsx renders links and auto-creates missing pages

capabilities.name: Version history
capabilities.verify: no revision table, skill, or UI for wiki_pages

capabilities.name: Access permissions
capabilities.verify: no permission management skill or UI
capabilities.notes: Only fixed RLS (authenticated read+write, admin delete); no per-page permissions surface.
